category_sources: source_facts.description describes Landrun as a lightweight secure sandbox using Landlock LSM.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is landrun and source_facts.homepage points to the official Zouuup/landrun repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Zouuup/landrun, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Linux-process sandbox using Landlock LSM.
